title: Mawler
move_pattern: Starts with Claw. Then randomly selects from Claw, Rip and Tear, or Roar each turn — cannot repeat the same move consecutively. Roar can only be used once per combat.
notes: Roar applies 3 Vulnerable and can only be used once per combat (UseOnlyOnce). Claw and Rip and Tear cannot be used on consecutive turns (CannotRepeat). All three moves have equal weight in the random selection.
